=====On hand===== {{TrainerPoké |pkmn=Krookodile |trainer=Nanu |type1=Ground |type2=Dark |img=Nanu Krookodile.png |epnum=SM074 |epname=Tough Guy Trials! |vaen=Marc Thompson |vajp=Toru Sakurai |desc={{p|Krookodile}} is Nanu's first known Pokémon. It was first used during Nanu's first battle against {{Ash}} and his {{AP|Lycanroc}}. During the battle, Nanu had Krookodile deliberately anger Lycanroc, who eventually went berserk after its fur was dirtied by Krookodile's {{m|Mud-Slap}}. Lycanroc proceeded to attack wildly until it was defeated by Krookodile's {{m|Crunch}}. Krookodile reappeared in ''[[SM077|Guiding an Awakening!]]'', where it was the first Pokémon Nanu used in his grand trial battle against Ash and Lycanroc, and sought to pull off a similar strategy to the first battle. However, this time, Lycanroc wasn't phased and was able to defeat the Intimidation Pokémon, delivering the finishing blow with a {{m|Rock Throw}}. Krookodile's known moves are {{m|Sand Tomb}}, {{m|Mud-Slap}}, {{m|Counter}}, and {{m|Crunch}}, and its Ability is {{a|Intimidate}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |pkmn=Sableye |trainer=Nanu |type1=Dark |type2=Ghost |img=Nanu Sableye.png |epnum=SM077 |epname=Guiding an Awakening! |vaen=Bill Rogers |vajp=Kaito Ishikawa |desc={{p|Sableye}} is Nanu's second known Pokémon. It was the second Pokémon he used against {{Ash}} and his {{AP|Lycanroc}} in Ash's grand trial battle. It used Mean Look to immobilize Lycanroc and inflict damage while Lycanroc could not counter it, but ended up being defeated by the Wolf Pokémon's {{m|Stone Edge}}. Sableye's known moves are {{m|Shadow Ball}}, {{m|Shadow Sneak}}, {{m|Shadow Claw}}, and {{m|Mean Look}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |pkmn=Persian |trainer=Nanu |type1=Dark |img=Nanu Persian.png |epnum=SM077 |epname=Guiding an Awakening! |vaen=Laurie Hymes |vajp=Fumiko Takekuma |desc={{rf|Alolan}} {{p|Persian}} is Nanu's third known Pokémon. It is larger than most Alolan Persian, with {{Rotom}} comparing it to a [[Totem Pokémon]]. It was the final Pokémon he used against {{Ash}} and his {{AP|Lycanroc}} in Ash's grand trial battle and used a mixture of ranged and close quarters attacks to counter Lycanroc. However, after having its [[Z-Move]] countered, it ended up being defeated by the Wolf Pokémon's {{m|Accelerock}}, winning the battle for Ash. Persian reappeared in ''[[SM090|Securing the Future!]]'', where it joined the rest of Alola in showering {{an|Necrozma}} with [[Z-Power]] by using its Z-Move so it could return to its {{DL|List of Pokémon with form differences|Necrozma|true form}}. In ''[[SM140|Z-Move Showdown!]]'', Nanu used Persian alongside the other kahunas' Pokémon to battle a {{DL|Ultra Beasts (anime)|Manalo Stadium Guzzlord|Guzzlord}} and successfully managed to send it back in its [[Ultra Wormhole]] using their combined Z-Moves. In ''[[SM146|Thank You, Alola! The Journey Continues!]]'', Persian was seen facing [[Hau]] and his {{p|Decidueye}} in a grand trial battle. Persian's known moves are {{m|Power Gem}}, {{m|Dark Pulse}}, and {{m|Night Slash}}.
Persian can also perform the [[Z-Move]] {{m|Black Hole Eclipse}}.}}
